requiredOptions.surface: object exposing subscribeAccept, subscribeEdit, and readPendingPreview
requiredOptions.store: official persistence store interface exposing writePreviewResult and readPreviewResult
requiredOptions.createPreviewResultId: function returning a non-empty previewResultId string

optionalSurfaceCallbacks.notifyPersisted: called after a successful confirmed persistence

returnShape.dispose: idempotent function that unsubscribes accept and edit handlers
returnShape.getState: returns frozen diagnostic state without quote truth promotion

authorizedFlow: validate the injected official store interface
subscribe exactly one accept handler and one edit handler
accept handler reads the pending preview from surface.readPendingPreview()
accept handler creates previewResultId, createdAt, and expiresAt from injected factories
accept handler calls persistConfirmedQuotePreviewPdfResult with confirmed: true
accept handler notifies surface.notifyPersisted when provided
edit handler never calls the persistence adapter or store
edit handler notifies surface.notifyEditRequested when provided
dispose unsubscribes both handlers and is idempotent
duplicate accept while a persistence call is active is rejected
requiredTests: reject an invalid official store interface
subscribe exactly one accept handler and one edit handler
prove accept reads the pending preview from the surface
prove accept passes confirmed: true to the persistence adapter
prove accept generates deterministic createdAt and expiresAt from injected time
prove accept uses the injected previewResultId factory
prove edit performs zero persistence calls and zero store writes
prove notifyPersisted receives the persistence result
prove notifyEditRequested is invoked without persistence
prove duplicate concurrent accept is blocked
prove dispose unsubscribes both handlers exactly once
prove no direct window, document, or localStorage access exists
prove no engine, generic bridge, or quote-truth logic is introduced
forbiddenChanges: any runtime source file other than the two allowed files
DOM selectors or direct browser-global access
promotion of PDF extraction to official quote truth

dependencyContract.storePolicy: official store interface must be injected; wiring must not create a backend
dependencyContract.surfacePolicy: UI surface must be injected; wiring must not query DOM globals
